title: Release 0.3.9 installer and publish flow
acceptanceCriteria: Telegram diagnostics no longer collapse to a bare timeout message when safer, more precise classification is available.
Telegram diagnostics can truthfully distinguish general connectivity from Bot API HTTPS path failures where the probes allow it.
Codex websocket 403 warnings are classified correctly and do not storm across setup, doctor, verify, Final Summary, and Next steps.
Final Summary and Next steps are deduplicated, concise, truthful, and severity-correct.
Mini App port 3001 remains truthfully classified as conflict or supported reuse without misleading escalation.
Regression coverage is added for fixed product bugs and dedupe logic.
Proof bundle contains baseline reproduction, changes, evidence, verifier output, and final verdict.
Commit, push, PR, merge, and release/tag are completed only after successful fresh verify.
